clause.author: Kieran O'Donnell
clause.title: Application
clause.p: At least one shower must comply with Clause 5.2.

callout.p: ‘At least one shower’ means that in a dwelling with two or more showers, only one of the showers needs to comply with the requirements of this Part.
A shower subject to this Part is not required to be located on the ground or entry level of the dwelling.
